meaning: adj.生殖器崇拜的,阴茎崇拜的,生殖器的,阴茎的,阴茎状的
examples: Part of her phallic potency was always to conjure the chaos about to break out unless we buckled under.
Its obvious phallic nature notwithstanding, Erika believes the tower is the Grand Madame of Paris, the city of love.
Archeologists have unearthed thousands of phallic statues and talismans created by early civilizations throughout the world, celebrating fertility and manhood.
She points out how Ms. Abercrombie added Surrealist elements: a wise or perhaps not wise owl, a phallic lighthouse and a conch shell, which refer to sexuality, according to Ms. Fort.
